{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322035101C5483085B955BE7E1466"}"},"total":299},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7600479427521184574","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书是唯一一个我看完ai漫剧过来搜的小说，漫剧才更新到小说的二十二章[笑哭]我怕有生之年等不到直接搜小说了，没想到真有，真的很好看，很吸引人，感觉一般的洪荒文都必须去听道，明明知道有阴谋还要去[捂脸]好像必须走这一步似的，这本三清十二祖巫团结的设定确实很吸引人"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769630111,"group_id":"7527988302809418776","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个默默无闻的写作新手","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0ezLu1v/RIMu8pKaEfP+qg=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/fdefeced122242c2aaa53201eb0710e4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705612&x-signature=oliZAJsPapBHZ%2Fa2BIQwawIXprU%3D","user_id":"985597449876140","user_name":"袅袅若炊烟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"985597449876140","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7527988302809418776","book_info":{"abstract":"【洪荒】【三清】【不成圣】【敌对鸿钧】
穿越洪荒，成为三清老大太清，深知紫霄宫讲道实乃天坑，我三清当然选择不去啊。
看着自家两位弟弟，一个鼻孔朝天，一个性子率直，太清心中叹息。
只能靠着脑海中记忆，与天道鸿钧斗智斗勇，维持自己盘古父神家业。
一边教育改造自家弟弟，一边团结十二祖巫，一边改变无数天道小势，塑造大势逆天道大势。
天
道大势？那不是无数小势组合在一起形成的吗？
天道大势不可改？我无数小势组合在一起，看你能不能改。
紫霄宫讲道，鸿钧满心欢喜准备接收三清气运。
硬是等了十数个元会，三清不见踪影。
鸿钧：？？？我那么大三个弟子呢？
从太清出世开始，只因太清一个个或是有意或是无意的操作，洪荒开始变得面目全非。
鸿钧：天道，你不是说大势不可改？就这？
天道：？？？你问我我问谁？还能不能好好当合道人了，本天道看太清就不错。
鸿钧：……
太清：祖巫弟弟妹妹们，兄弟齐心，其利断金啊！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a878858c885fe7ea22cb9de8f0dd655b","author":"NPC晨曦","author_id":"","book_id":"7527988302809418776","book_name":"洪荒：三清祖巫团结，天道也无奈","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#203038","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7528087906326430232","read_count":"44615","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1130470"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"549","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,仙侠,穿越,洪荒,奇幻仙侠","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6aa4706916da0308ffd6b33d426f12ee~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779306661&x-signature=kZ0mGlH%2B%2Be0XHzCICiA3nYo8scc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"100303552827","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"210"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322035101C5483085B955BE7E1466"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读14小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":15,"forwarded_count":0,"l
